query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `agent_goals` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `agentId` int NOT NULL,
  `year` int NOT NULL,
  `month` int NOT NULL,
  `gciTarget` decimal(15,2),
  `closingsTarget` int,
  `volumeTarget` decimal(15,2),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `agent_goals_agentId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`agentId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `agent_goals_unique` (`agentId`, `year`, `month`)
);
command:
